# 04-run-the-aspire-validation-gate: Run the Aspire validation gate

- Validate that root `aspire.config.json` still points to `src/Hexalith.FrontComposer.AppHost/Hexalith.FrontComposer.AppHost.csproj`.
- Run appropriate Aspire CLI validation/inspection commands against the root AppHost.
- Confirm Docker remains available before any AppHost runtime validation that requires containers.
- Record validation results and commit the final task result.
